ModMetaData.name: Combat Extended - Infinite Ammo
ModMetaData.author: Stoneman
ModMetaData.description:
Infinite ammo!
This mod adds different variants of infinite ammo to more match the base game. This is for those who wants to still play around with ammo types but do not want to worry much about ammo logistics. This does make the game significantly easier, but can be fun.
Features: - Infinite Ammo (No Reloading) - Infinite Reserve (With Reloading) - Infinite Turret Ammo - Infinite Grenades - Player Faction Only option - Limit ammo stacks to 1 - Only spawn 1 of any ammo from spawns.
Load this mod AFTER Combat Extended.
Requires Combat Extended to function.
